text:
No, it is not the same IMHO.

If it is true that Chromium hangs 10% of times with regular pages
then it hangs at least 60% of times in web.whatsapp.com.

It hangs quite frequently also if you open a GoolgeSheet,
but still, not comparable with web.whatsapp.com wich is absolutely
whe worst case I found, and the page is almost un-usable.


Bye
Nicola
